parameters.query:
INSERT INTO oura_sleep (
  id, day, bedtime_start, bedtime_end, type,
  total_sleep_duration, deep_sleep_duration, rem_sleep_duration,
  light_sleep_duration, awake_time, latency, efficiency,
  average_heart_rate, lowest_heart_rate, average_hrv, average_breath,
  time_in_bed, restless_periods, sleep_phase_5_min,
  heart_rate_5_min, hrv_5_min, movement_30_sec
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.day }}',
  '{{ $json.bedtime_start }}',
  '{{ $json.bedtime_end }}',
  '{{ $json.type }}',
  {{ $json.total_sleep_duration }},
  {{ $json.deep_sleep_duration }},
  {{ $json.rem_sleep_duration }},
  {{ $json.light_sleep_duration }},
  {{ $json.awake_time }},
  {{ $json.latency === null ? 'null' : $json.latency }},
  {{ $json.efficiency }},
  {{ $json.average_heart_rate === null || $json.average_heart_rate === 0 ? 'null' : $json.average_heart_rate }},
  {{ $json.lowest_heart_rate === null ? 'null' : $json.lowest_heart_rate }},
  {{ $json.average_hrv === null ? 'null' : $json.average_hrv }},
  {{ $json.average_breath === null ? 'null' : $json.average_breath }},
  {{ $json.time_in_bed }},
  {{ $json.restless_periods === null ? 'null' : $json.restless_periods }},
  {{ $json.sleep_phase_5_min === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.sleep_phase_5_min + "'" }},
  {{ $json.heart_rate === null ? 'null' : "'" + JSON.stringify($json.heart_rate).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.hrv === null ? 'null' : "'" + JSON.stringify($json.hrv).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.movement_30_sec === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.movement_30_sec + "'" }}
)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  bedtime_start = EXCLUDED.bedtime_start,
  bedtime_end = EXCLUDED.bedtime_end,
  type = EXCLUDED.type,
  total_sleep_duration = EXCLUDED.total_sleep_duration,
  deep_sleep_duration = EXCLUDED.deep_sleep_duration,
  rem_sleep_duration = EXCLUDED.rem_sleep_duration,
  light_sleep_duration = EXCLUDED.light_sleep_duration,
  awake_time = EXCLUDED.awake_time,
  latency = EXCLUDED.latency,
  efficiency = EXCLUDED.efficiency,
  average_heart_rate = EXCLUDED.average_heart_rate,
  lowest_heart_rate = EXCLUDED.lowest_heart_rate,
  average_hrv = EXCLUDED.average_hrv,
  average_breath = EXCLUDED.average_breath,
  time_in_bed = EXCLUDED.time_in_bed,
  restless_periods = EXCLUDED.restless_periods,
  sleep_phase_5_min = EXCLUDED.sleep_phase_5_min,
  heart_rate_5_min = EXCLUDED.heart_rate_5_min,
  hrv_5_min = EXCLUDED.hrv_5_min,
  movement_30_sec = EXCLUDED.movement_30_sec

INSERT INTO oura_daily_sleep (
  day, score, deep_sleep, efficiency, latency,
  rem_sleep, restfulness, timing, total_sleep
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.day }}',
  {{ $json.score === null ? 'null' : $json.score }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.deep_sleep === null || $json.contributors?.deep_sleep === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.deep_sleep }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.efficiency === null || $json.contributors?.efficiency === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.efficiency }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.latency === null || $json.contributors?.latency === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.latency }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.rem_sleep === null || $json.contributors?.rem_sleep === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.rem_sleep }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.restfulness === null || $json.contributors?.restfulness === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.restfulness }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.timing === null || $json.contributors?.timing === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.timing }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.total_sleep === null || $json.contributors?.total_sleep === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.total_sleep }}
)
ON CONFLICT (day) DO UPDATE SET
  score = EXCLUDED.score,
  deep_sleep = EXCLUDED.deep_sleep,
  efficiency = EXCLUDED.efficiency,
  latency = EXCLUDED.latency,
  rem_sleep = EXCLUDED.rem_sleep,
  restfulness = EXCLUDED.restfulness,
  timing = EXCLUDED.timing,
  total_sleep = EXCLUDED.total_sleep

  steps, target_calories, target_meters, total_calories,
  meet_daily_targets, move_every_hour, recovery_time,
  stay_active, training_frequency, training_volume
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.day }}',
  {{ $json.score === null ? 'null' : $json.score }},
  {{ $json.active_calories === null ? 'null' : $json.active_calories }},
  {{ $json.average_met_minutes === null ? 'null' : $json.average_met_minutes }},
  {{ $json.equivalent_walking_distance === null ? 'null' : $json.equivalent_walking_distance }},

  {{ $json.inactivity_alerts === null ? 'null' : $json.inactivity_alerts }},
  {{ $json.low_activity_met_minutes === null ? 'null' : $json.low_activity_met_minutes }},
  {{ $json.low_activity_time === null ? 'null' : $json.low_activity_time }},
  {{ $json.medium_activity_met_minutes === null ? 'null' : $json.medium_activity_met_minutes }},
  {{ $json.medium_activity_time === null ? 'null' : $json.medium_activity_time }},
  {{ $json.meters_to_target === null ? 'null' : $json.meters_to_target }},
  {{ $json.non_wear_time === null ? 'null' : $json.non_wear_time }},
  {{ $json.resting_time === null ? 'null' : $json.resting_time }},
  {{ $json.sedentary_met_minutes === null ? 'null' : $json.sedentary_met_minutes }},
  {{ $json.sedentary_time === null ? 'null' : $json.sedentary_time }},
  {{ $json.steps === null ? 'null' : $json.steps }},
  {{ $json.target_calories === null ? 'null' : $json.target_calories }},
  {{ $json.target_meters === null ? 'null' : $json.target_meters }},
  {{ $json.total_calories === null ? 'null' : $json.total_calories }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.meet_daily_targets === null || $json.contributors?.meet_daily_targets === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.meet_daily_targets }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.move_every_hour === null || $json.contributors?.move_every_hour === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.move_every_hour }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.recovery_time === null || $json.contributors?.recovery_time === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.recovery_time }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.stay_active === null || $json.contributors?.stay_active === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.stay_active }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.training_frequency === null || $json.contributors?.training_frequency === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.training_frequency }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.training_volume === null || $json.contributors?.training_volume === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.training_volume }}
)
ON CONFLICT (day) DO UPDATE SET
  score = EXCLUDED.score,
  active_calories = EXCLUDED.active_calories,
  steps = EXCLUDED.steps,
  total_calories = EXCLUDED.total_calories,
  non_wear_time = EXCLUDED.non_wear_time,
  meet_daily_targets = EXCLUDED.meet_daily_targets,
  move_every_hour = EXCLUDED.move_every_hour,
  recovery_time = EXCLUDED.recovery_time,
  stay_active = EXCLUDED.stay_active,
  training_frequency = EXCLUDED.training_frequency,
  training_volume = EXCLUDED.training_volume

INSERT INTO oura_daily_readiness (
  day, score, temperature_deviation, temperature_trend_deviation,
  activity_balance, body_temperature, hrv_balance,
  previous_day_activity, previous_night, recovery_index,
  resting_heart_rate, sleep_balance
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.day }}',
  {{ $json.score === null ? 'null' : $json.score }},
  {{ $json.temperature_deviation === null ? 'null' : $json.temperature_deviation }},
  {{ $json.temperature_trend_deviation === null ? 'null' : $json.temperature_trend_deviation }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.activity_balance === null || $json.contributors?.activity_balance === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.activity_balance }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.body_temperature === null || $json.contributors?.body_temperature === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.body_temperature }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.hrv_balance === null || $json.contributors?.hrv_balance === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.hrv_balance }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.previous_day_activity === null || $json.contributors?.previous_day_activity === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.previous_day_activity }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.previous_night === null || $json.contributors?.previous_night === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.previous_night }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.recovery_index === null || $json.contributors?.recovery_index === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.recovery_index }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.resting_heart_rate === null || $json.contributors?.resting_heart_rate === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.resting_heart_rate }},
  {{ $json.contributors?.sleep_balance === null || $json.contributors?.sleep_balance === undefined ? 'null' : $json.contributors.sleep_balance }}
)
ON CONFLICT (day) DO UPDATE SET
  score = EXCLUDED.score,
  temperature_deviation = EXCLUDED.temperature_deviation,
  temperature_trend_deviation = EXCLUDED.temperature_trend_deviation,
  activity_balance = EXCLUDED.activity_balance,
  body_temperature = EXCLUDED.body_temperature,
  hrv_balance = EXCLUDED.hrv_balance,
  previous_day_activity = EXCLUDED.previous_day_activity,
  previous_night = EXCLUDED.previous_night,
  recovery_index = EXCLUDED.recovery_index,
  resting_heart_rate = EXCLUDED.resting_heart_rate,
  sleep_balance = EXCLUDED.sleep_balance

INSERT INTO oura_daily_stress (
  day, stress_high, recovery_high, day_summary
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.day }}',
  {{ $json.stress_high === null ? 'null' : $json.stress_high }},
  {{ $json.recovery_high === null ? 'null' : $json.recovery_high }},
  {{ $json.day_summary === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.day_summary + "'" }}
)
ON CONFLICT (day) DO UPDATE SET
  stress_high = EXCLUDED.stress_high,
  recovery_high = EXCLUDED.recovery_high,
  day_summary = EXCLUDED.day_summary

INSERT INTO oura_workouts (
  id, day, activity, calories, day_start, day_end,
  distance, intensity, label, source
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.day }}',
  {{ $json.activity === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.activity + "'" }},
  {{ $json.calories === null ? 'null' : $json.calories }},
  {{ $json.start_datetime === null || $json.start_datetime === undefined ? 'null' : "'" +
$json.start_datetime + "'" }},
  {{ $json.end_datetime === null || $json.end_datetime === undefined ? 'null' : "'" + $json.end_datetime + "'" }},
  {{ $json.distance === null ? 'null' : $json.distance }},
  {{ $json.intensity === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.intensity + "'" }},
  {{ $json.label === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.label.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.source === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.source + "'" }}
)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  activity = EXCLUDED.activity,
  calories = EXCLUDED.calories,
  day_start = EXCLUDED.day_start,
  day_end = EXCLUDED.day_end,
  distance = EXCLUDED.distance,
  intensity = EXCLUDED.intensity,
  label = EXCLUDED.label

INSERT INTO oura_events (
  id, tag_type_code, custom_name,
  start_day, end_day, start_time, end_time, comment
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  {{ $json.tag_type_code === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.tag_type_code + "'" }},
  {{ $json.custom_name === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.custom_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.start_day === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.start_day + "'" }},
  {{ $json.end_day === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.end_day + "'" }},
  {{ $json.start_time === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.start_time + "'" }},
  {{ $json.end_time === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.end_time + "'" }},
  {{ $json.comment === null ? 'null' : "'" + $json.comment.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}
)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  tag_type_code = EXCLUDED.tag_type_code,
  custom_name = EXCLUDED.custom_name,
  start_day = EXCLUDED.start_day,
  end_day = EXCLUDED.end_day,
  start_time = EXCLUDED.start_time,
  end_time = EXCLUDED.end_time,
  comment = EXCLUDED.comment

WITH period_days AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT start_day AS day
  FROM oura_events
  WHERE tag_type_code = 'tag_generic_period'
),
period_starts AS (
  SELECT day AS start_day
  FROM period_days pd
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM period_days pd2
    WHERE pd2.day = pd.day - INTERVAL '1 day'
  )
),
cycle_lengths AS (
  SELECT
    start_day,
    LEAD(start_day) OVER (ORDER BY start_day) AS next_start,
    LEAD(start_day) OVER (ORDER BY start_day) - start_day AS cycle_length
  FROM period_starts
),
day_cycle AS (
  SELECT
    dr.day,
    cl.start_day        AS cycle_start,
    cl.cycle_length,
    (dr.day - cl.start_day + 1) AS cycle_day,
    dr.temperature_deviation    AS temp_deviation
  FROM oura_daily_readiness dr
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT start_day, cycle_length
    FROM cycle_lengths
    WHERE start_day <= dr.day
    ORDER BY start_day DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) cl
  WHERE dr.temperature_deviation IS NOT NULL
),
phase_calc AS (
  SELECT
    dc.*,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM period_days pd WHERE pd.day = dc.day
      )                                               THEN 'menstrual'
      WHEN dc.cycle_day <= 13                         THEN 'follicular'
      WHEN dc.temp_deviation > 0.15                   THEN 'luteal'
      WHEN dc.cycle_day > 13                          THEN 'luteal'
      ELSE                                                 'unknown'
    END AS phase,
    CASE
      WHEN dc.temp_deviation < -0.1                   THEN 'low'
      WHEN dc.temp_deviation BETWEEN -0.1 AND 0.1     THEN 'stable'
      WHEN dc.temp_deviation BETWEEN 0.1 AND 0.3      THEN 'rising'
      WHEN dc.temp_deviation > 0.3                    THEN 'high'
      ELSE                                                 'unknown'
    END AS temperature_phase
  FROM day_cycle dc
)
INSERT INTO oura_cycles (
  day, cycle_start, cycle_day, cycle_length, phase,
  temperature_phase, temp_deviation,
  is_period, has_migraine, has_pms, has_cramps
)
SELECT
  pc.day,
  pc.cycle_start,
  pc.cycle_day,
  pc.cycle_length,
  pc.phase,
  pc.temperature_phase,
  pc.temp_deviation,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM oura_events e
          WHERE e.start_day = pc.day
            AND e.tag_type_code = 'tag_generic_period')    AS is_period,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM oura_events e
          WHERE e.start_day = pc.day
            AND e.tag_type_code = 'tag_generic_migraine')  AS has_migraine,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM oura_events e
          WHERE e.start_day = pc.day
            AND e.tag_type_code = 'tag_generic_pms')       AS has_pms,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM oura_events e
          WHERE e.start_day = pc.day
            AND e.tag_type_code = 'tag_generic_cramps')    AS has_cramps
FROM phase_calc pc
ON CONFLICT (day) DO UPDATE SET
  cycle_start       = EXCLUDED.cycle_start,
  cycle_day         = EXCLUDED.cycle_day,
  cycle_length      = EXCLUDED.cycle_length,
  phase             = EXCLUDED.phase,
  temperature_phase = EXCLUDED.temperature_phase,
  temp_deviation    = EXCLUDED.temp_deviation,
  is_period         = EXCLUDED.is_period,
  has_migraine      = EXCLUDED.has_migraine,
  has_pms           = EXCLUDED.has_pms,
  has_cramps        = EXCLUDED.has_cramps;
